channel.title: Blogs on Jacob Wiseberg
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Jacob Wiseberg

item.title: Welcome to my new site
item.description: This is the first post on the redesigned site. The new design focuses on simplicity and readability, with a clean text-based layout that works beautifully on any device. No more complex layouts, no more heavy CSS. Just content that’s easy to read and navigate.
